non_blocking_notes: I did not run `npm run build` or `npm run test:e2e` because this review is read-only and those commands write build/test artifacts; Gate 5 still needs the required writable E2E run.
No added em dashes were found in the diff. Added member-facing fallback text is plain language.

The DataRequest route is absent by design for this slice: `specs/trust-pages.spec.md` and the current vault PRD §6.5 record the 2026-07-02 deferral and make email to `support@waiorg.me` the launch mechanism.

spec_compliance.criterion: /privacy page from vault Part 1, 2 July 2026 policy version
spec_compliance.evidence: `src/pages/privacy.astro:52-158` renders the amended privacy copy; `convex/members.ts:29-31` bumps `POLICY_VERSION` to `2026-07-02`.
`src/pages/safeguarding.astro:40-108` renders the public statement and links data handling to `/privacy` at line 85.
English footer links `/privacy`, `/safeguarding`, `/terms` at `src/components/home/Footer.astro:42-44`; Arabic footer mirrors them at `src/components/ar/Footer.astro:45-47`.

spec_compliance.criterion: UX-1 noscript and verify timeout fallback
spec_compliance.evidence: `/join`, `/portal`, and `/verify` include noscript support email messages; `src/portal/VerifyApp.tsx:30-70` shows a human fallback after 8 seconds without a lookup result.
`public/robots.txt:1-6` allows the site, disallows `/portal` and `/verify`, and points to `https://www.waiorg.me/sitemap-index.xml`.
`astro.config.mjs:55-58` configures `@astrojs/sitemap` with a filter excluding URLs containing `/portal` or `/verify`.

spec_compliance.criterion: Canonical URLs + og:url from one site constant
spec_compliance.evidence: `site.config.mjs:4` defines `SITE`; `src/layouts/Base.astro:22-47` emits absolute canonical and `og:url`; every Astro page passes a `path` prop.

spec_compliance.criterion: hreflang on six EN/AR page pairs plus x-default
spec_compliance.evidence: `src/layouts/Base.astro:49-53` emits reciprocal alternates and x-default; the six EN/AR route pairs pass reciprocal `path` and `alternate` props.
`src/pages/portal/index.astro:6-10` and `src/pages/verify/index.astro:6-10` pass `noindex`; `src/layouts/Base.astro:45` renders the robots meta tag.
`src/pages/404.astro:20-33` renders the requested message, Arabic line, and Home / Join / Contact links.

spec_compliance.criterion: Organization JSON-LD on EN and AR home pages
spec_compliance.evidence: `src/pages/index.astro:34-63` and `src/pages/ar/index.astro:26-49` include Organization JSON-LD with name, url, logo, email, sameAs, and parentOrganization.
`tests/e2e/trust-pages.spec.ts` covers privacy, safeguarding, footer legal links, terms, robots, sitemap, canonical/hreflang, rendered 404, and noindex presence.

spec_compliance.criterion: No copy invention on the new trust pages
spec_compliance.evidence: Privacy, safeguarding, and terms prose trace to the cited vault notes; observed deviations are recorded source-map/spec substitutions for `/safeguarding`, date fill, support email links, and the deferred email-based data request route.

summary: No ship-blocking authorization, safeguarding, validation, secret, data-leakage, audit-trail, brand-lock, or spec-compliance issue found in the current trust-pages diff. Gate 5 still needs the full build and Playwright suite in a writable environment.
